metadata.note: Fixture-scoped deck-roguelike encounter for the Synthetic Player Balance Demo v1 (#1609). Deterministic, no network/live browser. smite (18 dmg) and hex (15 dmg) form a degenerate combo that dominates play and is co-played in every winning run; brick (cost 4) is an unaffordable dead item; strike is a normal card. The warden (95 HP) is tuned so that proposing a smite nerf (18 -> 6) re-runs the identical seed distribution to a lower win-rate, demonstrating the read-only cockpit's re-run diff.
